creator: martin@sugioarto.com
text:
Created attachment 175883
All three mention ports are updated in this patch

Hi,

I've prepared a patch for hs-xmonad & hs-xmonad-contrib to version 0.12.

Also:

- I removed all patches including XFORK_FIX (it seems it is not needed anymore).
- New port as dependency: devel/hs-setlocale

--
Martin
